action_items.action: WC PREDICTOR DESIGN DELIVERED — Miguel posted Figma designs in #gdc-wcpredictor at 10:01 today: 'here you go. The proper GDC versions are the ones in the dark grey sections.' GDCU-8935 is still In Progress in Jira (last Jira update 11/05). Review the Figma now against all acceptance criteria: entry flow, group stage 48 matches, knockout bracket, outrights, leaderboard, mobile-first 3 breakpoints, error states, mid-tournament edge cases. Approve and confirm dev handoff is unblocked for the 11 June deadline.

NEW IN PRODUCT: REVIEW GDCU-8957 Local Nav on News Articles (Carlos Blauth, Medium, landed In Product 12/05 11:19). Carlos posted QA staging links yesterday afternoon; Robin John verified this morning — desktop + mobile confirmed, breadcrumbs unaffected across multiple news article page types. Chloe commented at 11:19 flagging Thursday's release window for Butlin and Dan Smullen. Review and approve today to make the Thursday build. Stakeholders: Michael Butlin, Gabriel Cornoiu, Joshua Smith, Dan Smullen, Eoin McCarthy.

NEW IN PRODUCT: REVIEW GDCU-8925 CWV Changes via Viktor AI (Novica Vukobratovic, Medium, updated 12/05 10:44). QA signed off by Shane McGrath at 10:38 (global pages, geo selector, oplists, review pages, articles, desktop + mobile). Chloe asked Eoin to close at 10:44 — but ticket remains In Product awaiting Mike. Five key risk areas Novica flagged: (1) operatorlist.css 330-line cleanup — visual regression risk across all oplist pages; (2) lazy-mount country selector; (3) image parity with production; (4) GX page CSS extracted from app.css; (5) article hero fetchpriority=high. NOTE: new GX page group JSON must be set to noindex (not draft) on production Origins before release. Confirm and close. Stakeholders: Gabriel Cornoiu, Chloe Christie, Joshua Smith.

REVIEW GDCU-8847 VIP Rev Share Operator List (Nebojsa Stanic, In Product, Day 4 — last updated 11/05 13:19). QA passed on 08/05 (Shane McGrath verified VIP vs non-VIP oplist, correct ranking, filtered oplists unaffected). Nebojsa updated dev staging yesterday. UK VIP personalisation feature — show custom operator list to ktag vip_level ≥2 users via AdTech personalisation API. Approve or provide feedback to unblock. Stakeholders: Gabriel Cornoiu, Chloe Christie, Joshua Smith, Danilo Zdravkovic, Marcin Tazbir.

GDCU-8907 BETTING TIPS HUB — Still Blocked/In QA (Sanja Budic, Day 6, last Jira update 06/05 17:00). No ticket movement despite Sanja saying fix was done on 07/05 after European leagues returned. Check with Sanja: is fix confirmed deployed on QA? If yes, unblock the ticket now so QA can resume and progress to In Product. Hot ticket — Michael Butlin, Dan Smullen, Gabriel Cornoiu, Miguel Migneco are stakeholders. Butlin is at tomorrow's GDCC meeting.

RETRO TOMORROW (13/05) — Chloe Christie posted in #gdc-pod at 10:38 today asking the team to add points to the Retrium board before tomorrow's sprint retrospective. Add your retro points today before EOD.

GROUP BETS — No Slack update or Jira movement seen today. Design target was Thu 07/05 (Miguel, per Chloe commitment 05/05). Check with Miguel now: Group Bets design done? If yes → schedule KO call with Chloe and dev team immediately (11 June hard deadline). If not → assess impact and update Chloe before tomorrow's GDCC agenda meeting.

GDCU-8810 DEVELOPER ACCOUNTS — Still Blocked (Harden, Day 6, no update since 06/05). Contact RotoWire team today to check if GDC Group already has org-level Apple/Google developer accounts and a D-U-N-S number — this shortcut could cut timeline from 6–8 weeks to 1–2 weeks. GDCU-8806 (Age Gate) and GDCU-8936 (Ace Nav) are both now Done — the app pipeline is ready to progress once accounts are unblocked. Stakeholders: Gabriel Cornoiu, Chloe Christie, Carlos Blauth.

VIC DADSON — Day 21+ of zero Slack activity (last seen 21/04). No messages today. Expected return from sick leave was ~05/05. Reach out directly: wellbeing check-in first, then re-establish data engineering plan. If still unreachable, escalate to Colin Brannigan today and agree a formal cover plan.

JESSICA DORDEVIC — No Slack activity today, but GDCU-8948 (Prize Boxes 5th Box) was marked Done yesterday (11/05 11:47) and GDCU-8906 (NL Claude Generated Tables) is now In Progress (11/05 11:59) — good momentum. Outstanding: Jessica asked on 08/05 for your feedback on 'the design she did for Colin and Dean.' Identify the specific design and respond today.

LIAM CAFFREY INTERVIEW — Likely Wed 14/05 12–3pm with Gabriel. Liam noted on Friday that Mike's calendar looks full in that window. Check calendar and reply to Liam's DM today to confirm or reschedule.
